ddls:
CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the payment */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shop where the payment was made */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order associated with the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "payment_status" INTEGER /* Status of the payment (e.g., PAID, NOT PAID) */,
  "payment_mode" INTEGER /* Mode of payment (e.g., CARD PAYMENT, COD) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_gateway_response" TEXT /* Response from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the payment method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_status FOREIGN KEY ("payment_status") REFERENCES payment_statuses ("payment_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_mode FOREIGN KEY ("payment_mode") REFERENCES payment_modes ("payment_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shops" (
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop */,
  "shop_name" TEXT /* Name of the shop */,
  "shop_address" TEXT /* Address of the shop */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the shop */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the shop */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shop record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shop record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_modes" (
  "payment_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment mode */,
  "payment_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment mode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment mode record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment mode record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_statuses" (
  "payment_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment status */,
  "payment_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Number of points required to join the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty program record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty program record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_loyalty" (
  "customer_loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer loyalty record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "redemption_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer redeemed their loyalty points */,
  "points_earned_date" TEXT /* Date when the points were earned */,
  "points_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the points will expire */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer loyalty record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer loyalty record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_loyalty_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_loyalty_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "payment_gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the payment gateway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment gateway */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment gateway record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment gateway record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateway_payments" (
  "payment_gateway_payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway payment */,
  "payment_id" TEXT /* ID of the payment transaction */,
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment gateway */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "response_code" TEXT /* Response code from the payment gateway */,
  "response_message" TEXT /* Response message from the payment gateway */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment gateway payment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment gateway payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_gateway_payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_gateway_payments_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_gateway_payments_payment_gateway_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_gateway_id") REFERENCES payment_gateways ("payment_gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_payments" (
  "card_payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card payment */,
  "payment_id" TEXT /* ID of the payment transaction */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Card number used for payment */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the card */,
  "cvv" TEXT /* CVV number of the card */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of card (e.g., Visa, Mastercard) */,
  "cardholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the cardholder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the card payment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the card payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_payments_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cod_payments" (
  "cod_payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COD payment */,
  "payment_id" TEXT /* ID of the payment transaction */,
  "cod_amount" REAL /* Amount of the COD payment */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for COD payments */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Delivery address for COD payments */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the COD payment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the COD payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cod_payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cod_payments_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., payment processing, customer loyalty) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
